3274860.name: Biohazard: Siberia Demo
3274860.description:
Welcome to Biohazard Siberia Demo! 

Quick introduction, you get to try out the First Level of the game, which starts right after the Intro. You are introduced to Owen Reeves, your character, and your new Workplace, Ark Nexus secret Research Facility located in the heart of Siberia. 

After a breach happens, you are left on your own to find a way out. You soon find out that the reality is not what it seems. We don't want to spoil it, so go and play! We truly hope you enjoy!

The Demo contains around 20 minutes of gameplay, the First Level. You can't die so you can finish it in one go! 

Have fun!

Veilshift Games
3274860.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
